# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 30, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for May 30, 2026, focused on refining core agent functionality, specifically addressing how the framework handles web lookup operations to improve reliability and security.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Core Logic Improvements**
    *   [#8067](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8067): A new pull request was opened to resolve web lookups by forcing them to a search action, preventing the system from defaulting to a shell fallback.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*No issues were closed on this date.*

## NEW ISSUES
*No new issues were opened on this date.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*No active issues met the criteria for inclusion.*
